name: West Coast Garlic Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter, peanut or olive oil, lemon juice, tarragon, lemon peel, and red pepper flakes in a bowl to make a marinade.
2. Place the salmon steaks on the broiler pan and brush each steak with half of the marinade.
3. Broil under a pre-heated broiler at 2 inches from the heat for 4 minutes.
4. Turn the steaks and brush with the remaining marinade.
5. Continue broiling until the fish flakes easily to fork (about 4 more minutes).
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
